result.summary: Gumtree Australia exposes a known public MCP server at `https://gt-api.gumtree.com.au/partner/mcp/39cc77d5c8ae755375b92dfaf4d9ce072fe5a8692f1ea1804e254a88945d225c/`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on `gumtree.com.au`.
result.description: Gumtree Australia is an online classifieds marketplace for buying, selling, jobs, vehicles, property, and local services. Its public site and help center focus on consumer marketplace use and business packages.
